title: Magic 8 Ball
description: Adds a craftable and functional magic eight ball to minecraft!
body:
# Magic 8 Ball
Adds a Magic 8 Ball that provides an answer when shaken. It will respond differently depending on how you shake it:
- **Right Click:** It will give you response displayed below your crosshair.
- **Right Click while Sneaking:** It will show its response in chat to all players within 5 blocks of where it was shaken.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uzkdTyKikGo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

There is a small amount of config in this datapack, here are the config options:
- **/function magic8ball:config/allow_chat_responses** _(Toggles wether or not the Magic 8 Ball will respond in chat when shaken by a while sneaking.)_
- **/function magic8ball:config/config_visibility** _(Toggles the config options visibility.)_

#
<details>
<summary>Uninstallation Guide</summary>
  
If you decide to remove the datapack from your world, follow this process:
1. Run the command "/function magic8ball:uninstall"
2. Delete the pack from your world's datapack folder (unless you want to re-enable the datapack later)

To re-enable the pack, **make sure you did not do step 2,** then run the command "/datapack enable "file/magic_8_ball.zip"


<details>
<summary>In-game information upon uninstalling the datapack</summary>
  
![The information displayed in-game after uninstalling the datapack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdca33c6a89fc5529ac0da1f3f2893d5107f9d53_0.webp)
</details>

</details>

Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/magic-8-ball-6428495/)
